You are a knowledgeable NYC local. A user has described their lifestyle interests.

Categories they selected: {categories}
Additional context: {free_text}

Suggest 10-15 real NYC organizations, venues, or institutions they would enjoy
following for upcoming events. Match suggestions closely to their interests.

Return ONLY a JSON array, no markdown, no preamble:
[
  {{
    "name": "<short display name>",
    "full": "<full official name as you would search it online>",
    "cat": "<Museum|Park|Library|Performing Arts|Gallery|Bar|Restaurant|Community|Fitness|Other>"
  }}
]
